name: source-claim-verification
triggers: An error label names its own cause with unknown provenance (rate limited, quota exceeded, throttled, timeout, out of memory, permission denied)
A claim arrives via a summary of a source that can be opened directly (the docs say, the log shows, the vendor reports, according to)
A draft diagnosis rests on a label or summary with no primary-source trace
counterindications: Provenance already established live this session (claim traced to its emitting line or primary document)
Primary source cannot be opened; the claim gets an explicit unverified label instead of a trace
